system.description:
Always return from the battlefield.

– Dissidia Final Fantasy, Dragoon's Battle Verse

Dragoons are spear-wielding warriors who emulate the fighting tactics of dragons with massive leaps and magic.

Iconic Dragoons

  • Kain Highwind, Final Fantasy IV
  • Kaladin Stormblessed, Stormlight Archive
  • Messmer the Impaler, Elden Ring

Playing Dragoon

Dragoons are mid-defense striking gishes with a ton of mobility.

Action: Attack
Move: Frontline/Midline
Starting Pack: Knight
Key Stat: Might
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: Melee
Skills: Mysticism, and 3 from either Arcana, Detect, Influence, or Leadership

Class Features

Level

Features

1st

Dragoon's Leap, Battle Litany

2nd

Elemental Resistance

3rd

Perk

4th

High Jump

5th

Perk

6th

Meteor (Close)

7th

Perk

8th

Mythic Mein

9th

Perk

10th

Stardiver, Meteor (Near)

levelFeatures.name: Dragoon's Leap
levelFeatures.description: You are permanently under the effects of the Leap Spell, and you can Attack and Jump with the same Action.

levelFeatures.name: Battle Litany
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Heavy Arms Perk and, if you hit with an Attack after a Jump, the damage dice can Explode on a 1 or 2.

levelFeatures.name: Elemental Resistance
levelFeatures.description: You reduce Cold, Fire, and Shock damage you take by (half your Dragoon Level) per damage die.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: High Jump
levelFeatures.description: The distance or height you can leap with the Leap Spell increases by 10' now, and every 4 Dragoon levels hereafter.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Meteor
levelFeatures.description: Any dice that Explode from your attacks also damage Close Beings of your choice.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Mythic Mein
levelFeatures.description: Once per Shift, if you are reduced to 0 HP, you regain HP equal to (2 × your Dragoon Level) and can immediately take an Action and Move.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Stardiver
levelFeatures.description: When you hit with an Attack after a Jump, choose one of the damage dice. That die Explodes, no matter its value.

levelFeatures.name: Meteor
levelFeatures.description: Exploded dice from your attacks now also damage Near Beings of your choice (upgraded from Close).

system.description:
Sic 'em!

– Dog Command

Mages who specialize in conjuration magic, summoners are able to create avatars from beings willing to lend them their power.

Iconic Summoners

  • Aladdin, Middle-Eastern folk tale
  • Ash Ketchum, Pokémon series
  • Corum Jhaelen Irsei, Chronicles of Corum
  • Gaige DiMartino, Borderlands 2
  • Yuna Braska, Final Fantasy X

Playing Summoner

Summoners call forth Summons to fight on their behalf, planting them firmly in the backline and prioritizing Spells that support their Summon and Allies.

Action: Cast (Summon)
Move: Backline
Starting Pack: Mage or Fortune Teller
Key Stat: Awareness
Complexity: ★★★★☆

Training

Weapons: –
Skills: Mysticism and 3 others

Class Features

Level

Features

1st

Arcanum, Creature Codex

2nd

Soulbonder

3rd

Perk

4th

Second Nature

5th

Perk

6th

Avatar Emergence

7th

Perk

8th

Guardian Force

9th

Perk

10th

Ultimate Weapon

levelFeatures.name: Arcanum
levelFeatures.description:
You can Cast Spells using Mysticism.

Spells: You learn 4 Spells. You learn 1 other Spell every 2 Summoner Levels hereafter.

Mana: Your Maximum Mana is equal to (4 × your Summoner Level), and the highest amount of Mana you can spend to Cast a Spell is equal to (Awareness + half your Summoner Level, round up). You regain spent Mana when you Rest.

levelFeatures.name: Creature Codex
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Conjurer Perk, and can replace Spells you know with Summons. Additionally, you can choose a Summon with HD as high as your Summoner Level.

levelFeatures.name: Soulbonder
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Armor and Immunities of your Summons while they are conjured.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Second Nature
levelFeatures.description: Rather than Focus on a Summon, you can choose for it to remain for Cd4 Rounds.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Avatar Emergence
levelFeatures.description: Once per Shift, you can conjure a Summon without Mana to conjure it.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Guardian Force
levelFeatures.description: If you drop to 0 HP while you have a Summon conjured, the Summon remains for Cd4 Rounds. If the Summon isn't banished before this die shrinks, you are revived at 1 HP and gain 1 Fatigue.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Ultimate Weapon
levelFeatures.description: You can conjure Summons with HD as high as (your Summoner Level + 5).

system.description:
The opportunity of defeating the enemy is provided by the enemy himself.

– Sun Tzu, The Art of War

Samurai are an array of warriors with the common code of honor, and whose patient will subdues blind aggression.

Iconic Samurai

  • Auron, Final Fantasy X
  • The Bride, Kill Bill
  • Cyan Garamonde, Final Fantasy VI
  • Mugen and Jin, Samurai Champloo
  • Oda Nobunaga, Japanese Daimyo

Playing Samurai

Samurai excel at melee confrontation, encouraging Enemies to swing at them for an opportunity to exploit their mistakes.

Action: Attack/Hold
Move: Frontline
Starting Pack: Sellsword
Key Stat: Might
Complexity: ★★★★☆

Training

Weapons: Melee
Skills: Detect and 3 others

Class Features

Level

Features

Bushido

1st

Dust Into Mountains, Bushido

1

2nd

Stillness of Body

1

3rd

Perk

1

4th

Poise Breaker

2

Perk

2

6th

2

7th

Perk

3

8th

For Honor

3

9th

Perk

3

10th

–

4

levelFeatures.name: Bushido
levelFeatures.description: Keen Melee Weapons have the Brutal and Shield properties for you, and they ignore 1 of your Target's Armor. This number increases by 1 every 3 Samurai Levels hereafter.

levelFeatures.name: Dust Into Mountains
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Perfect Parry Perk, and you can make two attacks if you attack with an Action granted by a Crit on a Save.

levelFeatures.name: Stillness of Body
levelFeatures.description: While you aren't Incapacitated and have a firm footing, you can't be pushed or pulled by another Being less than two sizes larger than you against your will.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Poise Breaker
levelFeatures.description:
The roll for you to Crit to Block is reduced by (your Samurai Level divided by 4) while you have a Keen Weapon equipped.

Further, if you hit with an attack that exceeds your Difficulty by 10 or more, the Target's Armor is reduced by your Bushido for the rest of the Turn.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Stillness of Mind
levelFeatures.description: You can't be Berserk, Charmed, Confused, Dazed, or Frightened against your will.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: For Honor
levelFeatures.description: Once per Shift, if you drop to 0 HP, you don't die and can immediately take an Action and Move as if it were your Turn. If you defeat an Enemy with this Action, you are at 1 HP instead. Otherwise, you die.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Bushido
levelFeatures.description: Your Bushido increases to 4. Keen Melee Weapons have the Brutal and Shield properties for you, and they ignore 4 of your Target's Armor.

system.description:
The secret of the successful fool is that he's no fool at all.

– Isaac Asimov

Jesters are masters of the art of imitation and wit. They are able to tap into Fate itself to goad and mimic others in a seemingly supernatural way.

Iconic Jesters

  • Buggy, One Piece
  • Jester, Darkest Dungeon
  • Kefka, Final Fantasy VI
  • Kinch Na Shannock, Blacktongue Thief

Playing Jester

Jesters are obnoxious midliners who attempt to goad their enemies away from the more serious threats on the battlefield.

Action: Mimicry/Provoker
Move: Midline
Starting Pack: –
Key Stat: Presence, Luck
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: Melee
Skills: Performance and 3 others

Class Features

Level

Features

1st

Sickle & Lute, Mockery

2nd

Tricky Maneuvers

3rd

Perk

4th

Lucky Streak

5th

Perk

6th

Sickle & Lute Enhancement

7th

Perk

8th

Perfect Goad

9th

Perk

10th

Finale

levelFeatures.name: Sickle & Lute
levelFeatures.description:
You gain either the Virtuoso Feature of the Bard, or the Sneak Attack Feature of the Rogue. You use your Jester Levels for those Class Levels.

When you become a 6th Level Jester, you gain the Feature you did not choose.

levelFeatures.name: Mockery
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Provoker Perk, and can use its effect by skipping your Move, and against all Near Beings of your choice who can hear or see you.

levelFeatures.name: Tricky Maneuvers
levelFeatures.description: The roll for you to Crit on Reflex Saves is reduced by an amount equal to (your Jester Level divided by 4, round up).

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Lucky Streak
levelFeatures.description: If you Crit, you gain 2 Luck, rather than 1. Further, if you have no Luck during a Breather, you gain 1 Luck.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Sickle & Lute Enhancement
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Feature you did not choose at 1st Level (either the Virtuoso Feature of the Bard, or the Sneak Attack Feature of the Rogue).

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Perfect Goad
levelFeatures.description: You can choose one Being goaded with your Provoker Perk. All of your Allies' Saves against the Target's attacks Crit on a roll that exceeds their Difficulty by 10 or more while you Focus on this Ability. You must spend 1 Luck each time you Focus on this Ability.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Finale
levelFeatures.description: You gain either the Climax Feature of the Bard or the Lethal Weapon Feature of the Rogue.

system.description:
Let it explode.

– Subway Ghost, Ghost

Psychics harness powers of the mind to control the world around them.

Iconic Psychics

  • Eleven, Stranger Things
  • Jesse Faden, Control
  • Prof. Charles Xavier, X-Men

Playing Psychic

The psychic is a feeble controller focused on their use of Talents.

Action: Cast (Talents)
Move: Backline
Starting Pack: Fortune Teller
Key Stat: Awareness
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: –
Skills: Mysticism, and 4 others

Class Features

Level

Features

Talents

1st

Psionics, Awakening

3

2nd

Precognition

3

3rd

Perk

4

4th

Duality (2 Talents)

4

5th

Perk

5

6th

Mental Fortress

5

7th

Perk

6

8th

Duality (3 Talents)

6

9th

Perk

7

10th

Transcendence

7

Talents

Absence (Focus): You are Invisible.
Ascend: Acts as the Levitate Spell.
Befuddle: Acts as the Confuse Spell.
Control: Acts as the Animate Spell.
Cryokinesis: Acts as the Freeze Spell.
Destroy: Acts as the Disintegrate Spell.
Evade (Focus): Grants a d4 Reflex bonus.
Launch: Acts as the Kinesis Spell.
Manifest: Acts as the Forge Spell.
Mediumship: Acts as the Speak Spell.
Pyrokinesis: Acts as the Burn Spell.
Seize: Acts as the Charm Spell.
Shield (Focus): Grants a d4 Armor bonus.
Transvection (Focus): You have Fly.

levelFeatures.name: Psionics
levelFeatures.description:
You gain 3 Talents from the list below, and 1 new Talent every 2 Psychic Levels hereafter.

As Spells: You use Mysticism for Talents, and you can Cast it as if you had spent Mana up to (half your Psychic Level).

levelFeatures.name: Awakening
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Telepath Perk, and can use your mind as a Trinket.

levelFeatures.name: Precognition
levelFeatures.description: Your first Save each Round is Favored while you are Focusing.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Duality
levelFeatures.description: You can Focus on two Talents at once.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Mental Fortress
levelFeatures.description: You can't be Berserk, Charmed, Confused, or Frightened against your will.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Duality
levelFeatures.description: You can Focus on up to three Talents at once.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Transcendence
levelFeatures.description: You can use your Action or skip your Move to change one of your Talents.

system.description:
I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.

– Bruce Lee

Warriors who pass down traditions of martial arts, monks are swift brawlers and mystics. They shuck raw damage for skills to lock down threats.

Iconic Monks

  • Bruce Lee
  • Dhalsim, Street Fighter series
  • Spike Spiegel, Cowboy Bebop
  • Shang-Chi, Marvel
  • Tifa Lockhart, Final Fantasy VII

Playing Monk

Monk is a flexible midline striker and controller, utilizing Martial Arts to lock down foes while weaving through attacks.

Action: Attack (Finesse)
Move: Flexible Frontline/Midline
Starting Pack: Monk
Key Stat: Dexterity
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: –
Skills: Finesse and Mysticism, and 2 others

Class Features

Level

Features

1st

Martial Arts, Fleet of Foot

2nd

Fluid Motion

3rd

Perk

4th

Impetus

5th

Perk

6th

Flurry of Blows (2 attacks)

7th

Perk

8th

Empowered Strikes

9th

Perk

10th

Flurry of Blows (3 attacks)

levelFeatures.name: Martial Arts
levelFeatures.description:
You can use a d4 for Finesse Weapons and, once per Round, you can spend half your Speed to make a second Finesse attack rather than skip your Move.

Further, when you hit with a Finesse attack, you can either:

  • Apply the Keen Property or, if Close to the Target, the Cleave Property.
  • Increase the size of your subsequent Finesse attack damage dice this Round, but no higher than a d12.

levelFeatures.name: Fleet of Foot
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Treads Lightly Perk (p. 73), and the roll for you to Crit on Reflex Saves is reduced by an amount equal to (your Monk Level divided by 4, round up).

levelFeatures.name: Fluid Motion
levelFeatures.description: During your Move, you can walk on liquid surfaces and along walls, sinking or falling if you end the Move off solid ground.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Impetus
levelFeatures.description: If you pass a Save to Dodge, you ignore two of the highest rolled damage dice, rather than one.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Flurry of Blows
levelFeatures.description: Once per Round, you can make an extra Finesse attack when you either attack with a Finesse Weapon or spend half your Speed. Every 4 Monk Levels hereafter, you can make this extra Finesse attack one additional time per Round.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Empowered Strikes
levelFeatures.description: You can use a d6 for the damage die of your Finesse Weapons.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Flurry of Blows
levelFeatures.description: Once per Round, you can make an extra Finesse attack when you either attack with a Finesse Weapon or spend half your Speed. Every 4 Monk Levels hereafter, you can make this extra Finesse attack one additional time per Round. At 10th Level, you can make this extra attack up to 3 times per Round.
